flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mount Mercy University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mount Mercy University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.5k → $40.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mount Mercy University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.5k → $40.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Mount Mercy University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (55.9% vs 62.0%).
